name: BOSL
description: The Belfry OpenScad Library - A library of tools, shapes, and helpers to make OpenScad easier to use.

name: BOSL2
description: Belfry OpenScad Library v2 - A library of tools, shapes, and helpers to make OpenScad easier to use.

name: dotSCAD
description: Reduce the burden of 3D modeling in mathematics.

name: NopSCADlib
description: An ever expanding library of parts modelled in OpenSCAD useful for 3D printers and enclosures for electronics, etc.

name: UB.scad
description: This library is a full 3D printing workflow solution for OpenSCAD, bringing tools for modifying and generating 3D objects, view helpers and a selection of mechanical parts.

name: Functional OpenSCAD
description: Implementing OpenSCAD in OpenSCAD.

name: Constructive Library
description: Extends OpenScad Language for complex and complementary mechanical parts with less mathematical code.

name: StoneAgeLib
description: All sorts of scripts for OpenSCAD. The scripts are for 3D models for 3D printing.

name: BOLTS
description: BOLTS is an Open Library of Technical Specifications.

name: Asset Collection
description: A collection of OpenSCAD Scripts. There are some mechanical parts, as well as furniture and models that can be used as base mesh for 3D animations and game design.

name: Board game toolkit
description: A collection of openscad scripts to make it easier to make boxes, targeting board games specifically.

name: Round Anything
description: Round-Anything is primarily a set of OpenSCAD utilities that help with rounding parts.

name: Mark's Enclosure Helper
description: A script for generating a two piece hinged box, with rounded corners, lid, interlocking rims, snap fit, magnet, or screw closures.

name: funcutils
description: This library is a collection of OpenSCAD functions for use with the function-literals feature.

name: OpenSCAD threads.scad Module
description: An efficient OpenSCAD threading library intended primarily to be used as a component in other designs.

name: OpenSCAD Smooth Primitives Library
description: This is a collection of some smooth primitives, i.e. having specified rounded edges, for use in other designs.

name: OpenSCAD Function Plotting Library
description: This is a general purpose function plotting library for OpenSCAD which will render functions with Cartesian coordinates, polar/cylindrical coordinates, or axial coordinates.

name: OpenSCAD ClosePoints Library
description: This is a general purpose OpenSCAD library for easily creating diverse shapes by simply creating lists of points which trace out layers.

name: Tray Library
description: Allows the design of trays with optional subdivisions for efficient storing of parts, such as hardware, small tools, board game inserts.

name: Yet Another Parametric Projectbox generator
description: A generator for electronic project boxes, based on a definition of a PCB and lots of options for defining PCB standoffs and case cutouts.

name: STEMFIE Parts Library
description: OpenSCAD library to create parts for the STEMFIE project, a free educational construction-set toy.

name: Catch'n'Hole
description: An ergonomic way to create nutcatches, screw holes and countersinks in OpenSCAD.

name: Pathbuilder
description: A fast way to create complex 2D shapes with fillets and chamfers using SVG syntax.

name: SCON - JSON for OpenSCAD
description: SCON is a convenient configuration data subset for OpenSCAD similar to JSON for Javascript.

name: Altair's 2D Library for OpenSCAD
description: A library of useful functions, modules and constants for 2D drawing in OpenSCAD.

name: Doll house
description: A library for creating wooden doll houses in OpenSCAD.

name: Dimensions
description: A library for drawing dimensions in OpenSCAD.
